25K Flex Plan – Sim Funded Reset

January 27, 2026

Table of contents

A Sim Funded Reset gives you up to two extra tries to reach your first payout if your 25K Sim Funded account is breached before any payout is taken. Instead of returning to the Evaluation, you can pay to reopen the same 25K Sim Funded account and continue under the Flex Plan payout rules.

Who can use a Sim Funded Reset?

You can use a Sim Funded Reset only if:

- The account is a 25K Flex Plan Sim Funded account

- The account was closed for a rule violation before your first payout.

- You are in good standing (no compliance restrictions)

If you have already taken a payout on that Sim Funded account, it cannot be reset.

What you get (and what you don’t)

Reset = fresh start on the same 25K Sim Funded account

A reset restarts the account state, including:

- P&L / balance progress

- Trade history and stats

- Winning days count (returns to zero)

What stays the same

- Account size: 25K

- Flex Plan payout rules: unchanged

Timing, limits, and cost

- Reset window: You have 7 calendar days from the time the Sim Funded account is closed to use the reset option. If you miss the window, you must return to the Evaluation to earn a new Sim Funded account.

- Maximum resets: Up to 2 resets per 25K Sim Funded account

- Price: $399 per reset (each purchased separately)

- Final sale: Reset purchases are non-refundable

How to activate a reset

A reset is only available after your Sim Funded account is closed for a rule violation (and only before your first payout). When it’s available:

- Go to your My Funded Futures Dashboard

- Open the breached 25K Sim Funded account

- Select Sim Funded Reset and complete checkout ($399)

Once purchased, your reset account becomes tradable at the start of the next trading session.

FAQs

What is a Sim Funded Reset?

It’s a paid option to reactivate a breached 25K Sim Funded account (before your first payout), so you can keep working toward payout eligibility without restarting the Evaluation.

Does a reset change the payout rules?

No. You keep the same Flex Plan payout structure.

Do my winning days carry over?

No. Your winning days reset to zero.

How soon can I trade after I purchase the reset?

Your reset account will be ready at the start of the next trading session after purchase.

Is this the same as an Evaluation reset?

No. This applies to Sim Funded accounts that were closed for rule violation.
